scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/app HEALTH_TOKEN=verify-placeholder VERIFY_ALLOW_PLACEHOLDER_ENV=1 npm run build
scripts.deploy: node scripts/mergeServerlessStageEnv.js --stage prod && KRATOS_RUNTIME_ENV_SOURCE=.env.prod KRATOS_MERGED_ENV_PATH=.env.prod npm run prepare:runtime-env && KRATOS_MERGED_ENV_PATH=.env.prod node scripts/assert-serverless-stage-env.js --stage prod && serverless deploy --stage prod --region eu-central-1
scripts.deploy:staging: node scripts/mergeServerlessStageEnv.js --stage staging && KRATOS_RUNTIME_ENV_SOURCE=.env.staging KRATOS_MERGED_ENV_PATH=.env.staging npm run prepare:runtime-env && KRATOS_MERGED_ENV_PATH=.env.staging node scripts/assert-serverless-stage-env.js --stage staging && serverless deploy --stage staging --region eu-central-1
